title: Weaker Consumer Growth in China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly China Report, China's retail sales in June grew year-on-year by just 2%. This has marked the worst performance seen since December 2022. Taking June's 0.2% inflation into account, retail sales adjusted for inflation grew year-on-year by just 1.8%.
